label: Daily DNA-damage UV dose
definition: Daily DNA-damage-weighted ultraviolet dose. (Result column: uvddc.)

label: Daily erythemal UV dose
definition: Daily erythemally-weighted ultraviolet dose. (Result column: uvdec.)

label: Daily vitamin-D UV dose
definition: Daily vitamin-D-weighted ultraviolet dose. (Result column: uvdvc.)

label: UV index at noon
definition: Ultraviolet index at local solar noon. (Result column: uvief.)
